nasb.text: Go now to the flock and bring me two choice young goats from there, that I may prepare them as a savory dish for your father, such as he loves.

esv.text: Go to the flock and bring me two good young goats, so that I may prepare from them delicious food for your father, such as he loves.

cnv.text: 你快到羊群那裡去，給我牽兩隻肥嫩的小山羊來，我要照你父親所喜歡的，給他預備美味的食物。

ccb.text: 你到羊群里选两头上好的山羊羔，我好照你父亲喜爱的口味做成美食，

csbs.text: 到羊群中去，从那里给我牵两只上好的小山羊来，让我照你父亲所喜爱的，为他做成美食；
